title: Consent
description: Versioned parental/guardian consent for processing a minor's data. White paper §8.1, §14.1 (Cameroon Law No. 2024/017). A new consent is appended; the old one is never overwritten.

consenter_contact.description: Phone/email of the consenting guardian (used for guardian account bootstrapping).

version.description: Increments when purposes change; prior versions retained.

revoked_at.description: Set by appending a revocation; the record itself is not deleted.
